sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24043" key="dendromala/xh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δενδρο-μᾰλάχη</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[λᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n24043.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tree-mallow, Lavatera arborea,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.5.6</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
